title: cyclobalanopsis edithiae
intro: Cyclobalanopsis edithiae, also known as Edith's oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae, native to Taiwan. The medicinal properties of Cyclobalanopsis edithiae include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and inhibiting the growth of certain cancer cells. Cyclobalanopsis edithiae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and can be found in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
